title: Glitter Sugar Cube, Sensory Fidget Toy, Squishy Stress Relief Cube with Sparkling Gel, Tactile Calming Companion, For Ages 3+
features: SENSORY DESIGN: Filled with slow-moving, sugar-like gel and sparkling glitter, this squishy cube provides an engaging tactile experience for hands-on play and stress relief
INTERACTIVE FEATURES: Squeeze, stretch, and manipulate the soft, pliable cube material to create mesmerising glitter movement and satisfying sensory feedback
CALMING COMPANION: Perfect for reducing stress and improving focus through repetitive tactile play, making it ideal for both work and relaxation settings
VIBRANT COLOURS: Available in eye-catching shades including pink, green, purple, and blue, each cube featuring stunning glitter effects that catch the light
AGE SUITABILITY: Designed for ages 3 and above, this fidget toy offers a safe and entertaining way to keep hands busy and minds engaged
description: Product Description Discover the mesmerising world of SCRUNCHEMS GLITTER SUGAR CUBE, a captivating sensory fidget toy that brings sparkle and satisfaction to your fingertips. Each cube features a unique, slow-moving gel interior filled with dazzling glitter that creates a fascinating visual display as you manipulate it. Perfect for both play and stress relief, these squishy cubes offer a delightfully tactile experience that can help improve focus and provide a calming sensory outlet. The soft, squeezable texture makes it irresistible to touch, while the glittering contents create an enchanting display that catches the light with every movement. Whether you're looking to keep fidgety hands occupied during work or study, or simply enjoy the satisfying sensation of squishing and stretching, these sugar-like cubes deliver hours of engaging entertainment. Suitable for ages 3 and above, these vibrant cubes come in an array of eye-catching colours including pink, green, purple, and blue, each containing its own sparkly surprise within. The perfect size for portable entertainment, these tactile toys can easily slip into a pocket or bag for on-the-go sensory play. Safety Warning Warning small parts. Chocking hazzard. Dispose of product at an approved recycing centre, not in household waste. Please retain this information.
